title: HAAGO - 100 Forks Cutlery Set - Reusable, Dishwasher Safe Heavy Duty Cutlery for Parties, Weddings, Events, for Hot & Cold Food - White 18cm / 7"
features: SUSTAINABLE - Made from 100% plant based materials, these forks are an excellent eco-friendly alternative, helping you reduce your environmental footprint.

HEAVY DUTY & DURABLE - Designed for strength and reliability, these forks are sturdy enough to handle a wide range of foods, making them perfect for any occasion, from casual picnics to formal events.
REUSABLE & DISHWASHER SAFE - Unlike other options, these forks can be washed and reused multiple times, offering a convenient and cost-effective solution while promoting a sustainable lifestyle.

PERFECT FOR EVENTS - With 100 high-quality forks in each set, these are ideal for weddings, parties, and large gatherings, adding a touch of elegance to your table while supporting eco-friendly practices.
SAFE & NON-TOXIC - Crafted from BPA-free and non-toxic materials, these forks are safe for everyday use, ensuring a worry-free dining experience for you and your guests.
description: Product Description great for picnics outdoor dining parties barbecues Previous page natural source corn starch or sugarcane are fermented to produce lactic acid which is polymerized to create pla reduced carbon footprint pla production emits fewer greenhouse gases compared to petroleum-based plastic cutlery renewable source pla is derived from renewable resources such as corn starch, making it a more sustainable choice recyclable packaging our packaging has a minimal impact on the environment and promotes responsible waste management biodegrade pla takes six months to break down into its natural materials in a commercial composting facility Next page 1 natural source 2 reduced carbon footprint 3 renewable source 4 recyclable packaging 5 biodegrade what is häago pla cutlery made from? plastic material called polylactic acid (pla) that can be biodegraded. The raw materials are derived from renewable resources such as corn starch. how is this pla cutlery manufactured? raw materials are harvested and processed to make natural sugars which are fermented to produce lactic acid, and then polymerized to create pla. These are then moulded into various shapes using injection moulding to produce pla cutlery. how long does pla cutlery take to biodegrade? pla cutlery takes approximately 6 months to biodegrade in a commercial composting facility. This means that it can break down into organic matter, such as water and carbon dioxide leaving no harmful residues. what certifications does pla have? our pla cutlery has received BPI and Din Certco certifications, which verifies that our products meet strict standards for compostability and biodegradability. how is pla cutlery packaged? our pla cutlery is packaged in boxes made from recycled paper or cardboard. This can biodegrade and be composted along with the contents. see more... 100 knives Add To Basket 100 forks Add To Basket 100 spoons Buying Options 200 knives Buying Options 200 forks Buying Options 200 spoons Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 155 4.7 out of 5 stars 155 — 4.6 out of 5 stars 6 — 4.7 out of 5 stars 155 Price £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 — — — — Quantity 100 100 100 200 200 200 Dimensions (cm) 18cm 18cm 16cm 18cm 18cm 16cm Dimensions (inches) 7" 7" 6" 7" 7" 6" Matching items available ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Breaks down naturally ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compost bin ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Recyclable packaging ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
